zh.lifeSummary: 當Herve III de Donzy de Vierzon於1131年出生在法國布格尼艾福可斯-庫斯-素-洛易多時，他的父親Geoffroy de Donzy III, Baron de Donzy37歲，母親Béatrix ou Garne de Cosnes21歲。他於大約1170年與Mathilde de Gouët d'Alluyes結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1187年在法國布格-福朗-可特艾尼艾福多享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Herve III de Donzy de Vierzon于1131年出生在法国布格尼艾福可斯-庫斯-素-洛易多时，他的父亲Geoffroy de Donzy III, Baron de Donzy37岁，母亲Béatrix ou Garne de Cosnes21岁。他于大约1170年与Mathilde de Gouët d'Alluyes结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1187年在法国布格-福朗-可特艾尼艾福多享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Donzy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Dansie
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, with fused preposition d(e), for someone from Anizy in Calvados, France, recorded in 1155 in the form Anisie. De Anesi became Danesi. The placename is probably derived from the Gallo-Roman personal name Anitius (of uncertain origin) + the locative suffix -acum.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Herve III de Donzy de Vierzon was born in 1131, in Donzy, Cosne-Cours-sur-Loire, Nièvre, Burgundy, France, his father, Geoffroy de Donzy III, Baron de Donzy, was 37 and his mother, Béatrix ou Garne de Cosnes, was 21. He married Mathilde de Gouët d'Alluyes about 1170. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1187, in Donzy, Nièvre, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Herve III de Donzy de Vierzon est né en 1131, à Donzy, Cosne-Cours-sur-Loire, Nièvre, Bourgogne, France, son père, Geoffroy de Donzy III, Baron de Donzy, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Béatrix ou Garne de Cosnes, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde de Gouët d'Alluyes environ 1170. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1187, à Donzy, Nièvre, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Herve III de Donzy de Vierzon 1131 in Donzy, Cosne-Cours-sur-Loire, Nièvre, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffroy de Donzy III, Baron de Donzy 37 und seine Mutter Béatrix ou Garne de Cosnes 21. Er hat um 1170 Mathilde de Gouët d'Alluyes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1187 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Donzy, Nièvre, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Herve III de Donzy de Vierzon è nato il nel 1131 nel Donzy, Cosne-Cours-sur-Loire, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia, il suo padre, Geoffroy de Donzy III, Baron de Donzy, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Béatrix ou Garne de Cosnes, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Mathilde de Gouët d'Alluyes circa 1170. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1187, nel Donzy, Nièvre, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Herve III de Donzy de Vierzonが1131年にフランスボウルゴグンニevアコスネ-コウルス-スル-ロイアードンズイで生まれた時，父Geoffroy de Donzy III, Baron de Donzyは37歳，母Béatrix ou Garne de Cosnesは21歳であった。約1170年にMathilde de Gouët d'Alluyesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1187年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeニevアドンズイで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Herve III de Donzy de Vierzon(이)가 1131년 프랑스 부르고그니 니e브르 코스니-쿠르스-수-로이르 돈즈이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffroy de Donzy III, Baron de Donzy(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Béatrix ou Garne de Cosnes(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1170년 Mathilde de Gouët d'Alluyes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1187년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 니e브르 돈즈이에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Donzi, France: Donzi, Төв Африкийн Бүгд Найрамдах Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Herve III de Donzy de Vierzon nasceu em 1131, em Donzy, Cosne-Cours-sur-Loire, Nièvre, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Geoffroy de Donzy III, Baron de Donzy, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Béatrix ou Garne de Cosnes, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilde de Gouët d'Alluyes aproximadamente 1170. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1187, em Donzy, Nièvre, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Herve III de Donzy de Vierzon родился в 1131 г. в местности донзи, косне-коурс-сур-лоир, ниeвр, бургогн, Франция, его отцу по имени Geoffroy de Donzy III, Baron de Donzy было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Béatrix ou Garne de Cosnes, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde de Gouët d'Alluyes около 1170 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1187 г. в местности донзи, ниeвр, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Herve III de Donzy de Vierzon nació en 1131, en Donzy, Cosne-Cours-sur-Loire, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Geoffroy de Donzy III, Baron de Donzy, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Béatrix ou Garne de Cosnes, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Mathilde de Gouët d'Alluyes aproximadamente 1170. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1187, en Donzy, Nièvre, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 56 años.
